title: What we're launching?
lede: May 6th's milestone focused mostly on our agents. This milestone focuses on the way of working of agents & people — letting our customers embed agents in their day-to-day work with ease and trust.

capabilities.title: Human & Agents collaboration
capabilities.description: Where people and agents work side by side — on the same goals, in the same place, with shared context.

items.title: Container / Initiatives
items.description: A workspace dedicated to a specific shared goal. The home for agents and people working together, with shared context.

items.title: Group chat
items.description: Conversations where people and agents talk side by side — same place, same context.

items.title: Notetaker
items.description: Desktop app that records meetings without Zoom limitations, and brings an agent to the call with full context to take action items.

capabilities.title: Ecosystem
capabilities.description: Your agents, our agents, partner agents. Connect monday to the AI tools your teams already use.

items.title: Bring your own agent
items.description: Plug in 3rd-party agents (Claude, OpenAI) with full access to your monday context.

items.title: Access monday from your AI tools
items.description: Use monday from leading AI tools like Make — the platform meets your team where they already work.

capabilities.title: AI workflows
capabilities.description: Agents embedded in the workflows people already use — with full control over what they do.

items.title: Control of agents in workflows
items.description: People stay in control of agents' inputs, outputs, and behavior — exactly what each agent is doing, end to end.

capabilities.title: Agents
capabilities.description: Everything that makes our agents top-notch: collaboration, context, trust, and a proactive sidekick.

items.title: Collaboration
items.description: Tag and mention agents like teammates.

items.title: Autosave & versioning
items.description: Never lose work. Roll back to previous versions.

items.title: Troubleshooting
items.description: Cut the 7% of credits lost to bad runs. Diagnose and fix in place.

items.title: Expanded artifacts
items.description: Agents produce HTML, docs, and decks — not just chat replies.

items.title: One-click MCP
items.description: Connect to any MCP server in a single click.

items.title: Context
items.description: Agents understand who you are, your team, and where work stands — they navigate monday with your mindset. Plus controls over what agents can access and how their knowledge scales.

items.title: Trust & governance
items.description: Visibility to value, permissions per user and team, guardrails — so adoption is safe.

items.title: Sidekick
items.description: Proactive in the context of your task. Produces artifacts (HTML, decks). Connects through integrations.

demo.title: See it in motion.
demo.caption: Drop a video at /public/video/product-demo.mp4 to replace this.
